title: Godot Steam / retail build
description: TDAD layer for the shipping Godot package: retail user:// paths, autosave mirror, one-time migration from kyndeblade_demo_* files, headless regression, export/Steamworks checklist. Behaviour parity remains in godot-parity-slice; persistence concepts trace to save-system (Unity) + this workflow (Godot). Human QA: KyndeBlade_Godot/STEAM_BUILD.md.

nodes.title: Retail save and settings paths
nodes.description: Primary kyndeblade_save.cfg, mirror kyndeblade_autosave.cfg, settings kyndeblade_settings.cfg. Proof: scripts/bootstrap/save_service.gd constants; STEAM_BUILD.md § Save and settings.

nodes.title: Autosave mirror and flush policy
nodes.description: Every save_progress writes primary + autosave; focus-loss and 90s periodic flush; pause→main menu flush. Proof: save_service.gd; STEAM_BUILD.md § Autosave.

nodes.title: Legacy demo cfg migration
nodes.description: First load from kyndeblade_demo_save.cfg or demo settings imports into retail paths and removes legacy files. Proof: run_headless_tests.gd _test_legacy_demo_save_migrates; save_service.gd.

nodes.title: Headless CI save and combat suite
nodes.description: tests/run_headless_tests.gd: save roundtrip, autosave mirror, autosave fallback load, legacy migration, combat_scenarios.gd. Proof: docs/CI_GODOT_TESTS.md.

nodes.title: Export, depots, Steam Cloud mapping
nodes.description: Godot export presets; depot upload; steam_appid local test; Steam Cloud paths vs user:// (partner config). Proof: human — STEAM_BUILD.md § Steam / desktop shipping; TDAD steam-early-access milestones.
